top_signals.title: Galaxy delivers 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave as Helios bitcoin mine turns AI hub

top_signals.title: Remembering Norman Tebbit
top_signals.summary: Norman Tebbit died one year ago today. He remains a mnemonic for the high days of the high days of Thatcherism, writes Eliot Wilson A year ago today, former Conservative Cabinet minister Lord Tebbit died at the age of 94. The media coverage was extensive for a man who had left office nearly 40 years [...]
